ocr_findings.description: '試験にはコレが出る！' rendered as '試験にはつしが出る！' — consistent icon-misread pattern.
花王のPPM (2012年) scatter-plot figure labels (individual bubble labels for products) are not extracted — replaced by image placeholder. The figure title '花王のPPM（2012年）' is retained as a text line.

reviewer_notes: PPM continuation page covering 問題児 follow-up, 金のなる木, and 負け犬 sections. All body paragraphs and the summary bullet list are accurately reproduced. Only low-severity findings.
